---
title: "Statistical Theory as Model"
---

Statistical Theory as Model-building

According to the Harvard political scientist Gary King, most statistical models within the social sciences take on the following form:

[Equations 1 and 2]

Where [definitions].
King, on the other hand, recommends changing the form of the model to the following:

[equations 3 and 4]

Where [definitions]

This […]

Can I be bothered finishing this?
It's difficult to write this section without using lots of pictures and some equations.
